title: helianthemum oelandicum var. origanifolium
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum var. origanifolium, also known as the Swedish mountain rose or Swedish rock rose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rockrose family (Cistaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum var. origanifolium include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
